title: Generating Markdown Headings
scenario: Write a prompt to generate markdown headings for a series of article titles, where each title should be formatted as a level 2 heading (## Title).
constraints: Must use the ## notation for level 2 headings

evaluationCriteria.description: The markdown headings are syntactically correct and follow standard markdown syntax.
The markdown headings accurately reflect the level 2 notation (## Title) for each article title.
The markdown headings are logically consistent and coherent with the article titles.
